nodes.norm_label: wikipedia ui: cristiano ronaldo page (sample input screenshot)

links.notes: The image shows an analytics platform dashboard UI
This file is used as the example/demo input for the PixelForge app
Dashboard contains a Conversion Rate KPI card showing 3.2% with -0.5% trend
Dashboard contains a 'Last 6 Months' date range filter dropdown in top-right area
The line chart likely visualizes the same revenue data shown in the Revenue KPI card
Dashboard contains an Orders KPI card showing 1,234 with -0.7% trend
Dashboard contains a Recent Orders table with customer, date, amount, and status columns
Dashboard contains a Revenue KPI card showing $89,400 with +1.2% trend
Dashboard contains a left sidebar navigation with Dashboard, Users, Orders, Settings, Users links
Dashboard contains a Total Users KPI card showing 12,345 with +4.3% trend
The demo input image shows a professional analytics dashboard UI, likely chosen to demonstrate PixelForge's image processing on a UI screenshot
The Recent Orders table provides detail behind the Orders KPI metric
